title: Command Cockpit Crew Chip Focus
summary: Turned the desktop Command Cockpit Overview bot handoff into a compact crew chip and softened the right edge so the selected lane reads as one focused game stage.
proof: Scoped the smaller bot chip to Command Cockpit Overview so other detail views keep their richer handoff card.
Trimmed crew avatar, copy, padding, and height to reduce right-side visual noise without hiding owner identity.
Added a pointer-safe focus fade on the selected-lane content edge so dense HUD text no longer reads as another hidden column.
